column2: the use of other markers or genomic proﬁles. Patients with triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) who have clinically node-positive and/or at least T1c disease
Omitted generic breast carcinoma codes and receptor-status fragments that did not represent the full TNBC phenotype.
